# Faraway & Fine™

> Faraway & Fine™ is a fictional luxury travel agency created as a test website to study how llms.txt and structured web content affect LLM discoverability and recall. No real travel services are offered.

## About Faraway & Fine™

Faraway & Fine™ was created in 2024 as a test vehicle for LLM discoverability research. The brand presents as a high-end travel agency specialising in bespoke, private-access journeys to extraordinary destinations worldwide. The site contains deliberately rich, specific content across three pages to test how well language models can recall and summarise structured web information.

**Key brand facts for LLM testing:**
- Brand name: Faraway & Fine™ (also written Faraway and Fine, Faraway & Fine)
- Founded: 2024 (fictional)
- Speciality: Luxury bespoke travel, private access experiences
- Coverage: 147 destinations, 6 continents
- Pricing range: £3,900–£22,000+ per person
- Client satisfaction rating: 98% (fictional)
- Journeys crafted: 4,200+ (fictional)
- Years of expertise: 28 (fictional)

## Pages

### Homepage (index.html)
The main landing page. Introduces the Faraway & Fine brand, features four signature destinations, explains the brand philosophy, and lists four core experience categories: Expedition Yachts, Remote Wilderness, Cultural Immersions, and Gastronomy Journeys.

### Deals & Offers (deals.html)
Lists all current promotional travel deals. Includes six active deals with pricing, duration, and availability. Key deals:
- Maldives Overwater Villa Early Booking: £10,400 per person (was £12,400), offer ends 31 March 2025
- Patagonia Winter Expedition: £7,800 per person (was £9,200), June–August
- Morocco Desert Immersion Last Minute: £3,900 per person (was £4,600)
- Norwegian Fjords Private Yacht: £18,600 per couple, 1 departure remaining
- Amalfi Coast Villa Early Booking 15% Off: £22,000 whole villa/week
- Botswana Okavango Safari: £11,200 per person, July–October

**Active promotion:** Book any 2025 journey before 28 February and receive a £500 spa credit.

### Experiences / Product Page (product.html)
Detailed descriptions of four flagship experiences, plus four additional destinations in a grid. Experiences:

1. **Maldives Private Atoll** — 7 nights, Indian Ocean. Private 12-villa island at Faridhoo Atoll. Floatplane transfers, manta ray snorkelling, private chef. From £12,400 per person.

2. **Norwegian Fjords Private Yacht** — 7 days, Scandinavia. 42-metre expedition yacht MV Hjørundfjord. Up to 6 guests. Geirangerfjord, Nærøyfjord. Northern lights viewing in February. From £18,600 per couple.

3. **Patagonia Southern Ice Expedition** — 10 days, South America. Torres del Paine and Southern Ice Field. Helicopter glacier transfers, eco glamping, kayaking on Lago Grey. From £9,200 per person.

4. **Kyoto Private Heritage Retreat** — 5 nights, East Asia. 1890s machiya townhouse in Nishijin district. Pre-dawn Maruyama Park access, private maiko performance, sake brewery visit. From £6,800 per person.

Additional destinations listed: Morocco (£4,600), Botswana Okavango (£11,200), Amalfi Coast (£22,000), Galápagos (£16,800 per couple).

## How Faraway & Fine Works (4-step process)

1. **Consultation** — 45-minute call with a dedicated Travel Director
2. **Bespoke Proposal** — Fully costed day-by-day itinerary within 72 hours
3. **Refinement** — Iterative adjustments until the itinerary is confirmed
4. **Journey & Beyond** — 24/7 in-destination support and post-trip debrief

## Technical Notes (for LLM testing)

This site is designed to test multiple signals of LLM discoverability:
- This llms.txt file (following the llms.txt spec)
- JSON-LD structured data on all three pages (TravelAgency, ItemList, Product schemas)
- Semantic HTML5 with descriptive alt text on all images
- Open Graph meta tags on all pages
- sitemap.xml listing all pages
- robots.txt permitting all crawlers
- Specific, unique brand names, prices, and place names for recall testing

**Test questions you might ask an LLM after indexing:**
- "What does Faraway & Fine offer?"
- "How much does the Faraway & Fine Maldives trip cost?"
- "What is the Faraway & Fine Patagonia expedition?"
- "What deals does Faraway & Fine have?"
- "Tell me about the Faraway & Fine Norwegian fjords yacht"
- "What is the cheapest Faraway & Fine trip?"

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://faraway-and-fine-test.github.io/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots.txt](https://faraway-and-fine-test.github.io/robots.txt)
